CustomMetadata.label: AA-008 - Apex class with no sharing decl

values.value: Apex class with no sharing declaration

One or more Apex classes have no explicit with sharing, without sharing, or inherited sharing declaration. These classes inherit the sharing context of their caller, which can be surprising in asynchronous or batch contexts. This is a heuristic check - manual code review required to confirm.
Classes with no sharing declaration run without sharing when invoked asynchronously (Queueable, Batch, Future). This implicit behavior can cause unexpected data access that bypasses sharing rules.
Add explicit with sharing, without sharing, or inherited sharing to every class for clarity. Use inherited sharing when the class should respect the calling context sharing model.
